'''Paledors''' were [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] animals that became extinct.

Han Solo acquired a small, valuable statue of one such animal when he robbed [[Teroenza]]'s collection.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}} {{C|As Statue}}
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{C|As Statue}}
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{Mo}}
